testcase.name: Data-driven login for different roles - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the login page..........................................passed When I enter username "rahulshettyacademy" and password "Learning@830$3mK2".passed And I select the "Admin" radio button.......................................passed And I select "Teacher" from the occupation dropdown.........................passed And I check the terms and conditions checkbox...............................passed And I click the Sign In button..............................................passed Then I should be redirected to the product page.............................passed

testcase.name: Data-driven login for different roles - Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the login page..........................................passed When I enter username "rahulshettyacademy" and password "Learning@830$3mK2".passed And I select the "User" radio button........................................passed And I select "Consultant" from the occupation dropdown......................passed And I check the terms and conditions checkbox...............................passed And I click the Sign In button..............................................passed Then I should be redirected to the product page.............................passed
